name: CleanShot X
description: Screenshot and screen recording tool — annotation, scrolling capture, OCR, and cloud upload

extraction.notes: Uses Sparkle 2 with appcast hosted at updates.cleanshot.com. The /v3/ path corresponds to CleanShot X version 3.x series. Older /v2/ path may exist for legacy versions.

changelog.notes: Release notes in <sparkle:releaseNotesLink> within appcast item, typically linking to cleanshot.com changelog page.

notes: Paid app (one-time purchase or Setapp subscription). Well-structured Sparkle 2 appcast. Download filename pattern: 'CleanShot-X-{version}.dmg' with dashes. The /v3/ path segment is for version 3.x; if a major version 4 is released, the path may change. The appcast provides release notes links to the cleanshot.com website. Also available via Setapp.
